questions.scenario: A script overwrites receipt PDFs with bad content. What question matters more than whether Cloud Storage is durable?

options.text: Is there a previous good version or recovery copy that can be restored?
Can the app use a larger font?
Can the checkout service ignore receipts forever?

questions.explanation: Durability can preserve bad data. Recovery copies decide whether the old good data is available.

questions.scenario: The team says backups are enabled but nobody has restored one. What is missing?

options.text: A checkout route in every function.

questions.explanation: A backup is not operationally useful until restore is understood and tested.

questions.scenario: Which recovery-copy questions belong in storage review?

options.text: Can we skip recovery because the first write succeeded?

questions.explanation: Recovery needs copy, retention, deletion, and restore thinking.
